description_long: This is a two-story suburban house surrounded by a well-maintained yard with several trees and shrubs. The house features a symmetrical facade with two prominent front-facing gables and shuttered windows. The exterior is finished in a light color, likely painted siding, with a dark gray gable roof. A paved driveway leads to a detached garage at the rear, and a walkway connects the front door to the street. The property is bordered by hedges and includes a mix of deciduous and evergreen landscaping. The overall setting suggests a quiet residential neighborhood with ample greenery and a traditional architectural style.
description: A two-story, light-colored suburban house with a gable roof, symmetrical windows, and a landscaped yard with trees and hedges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical facade, two gables, shuttered windows, main entryway, and driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the driveway, detached garage, and backyard landscaping with trees and hedges.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backyard, garden area, and the back of the house with additional windows and landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the side elevation, driveway, and more of the surrounding greenery and hedges.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, small porch, and decorative shutters flanking the entry.
